    Parses the given string into a boolean value.

    Parses a raw string and ensures the result does not exceed a specified maximum length.

    Parses a confidence value from a string representation.
    parseDouble(String, double) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses a string and attempts to convert it to a double value.
    parseDouble(String, double, double, double) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses a string to a double value while ensuring it falls within a specified range.
    parseDoubleList(String) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses a string containing a list of numbers into a list of Double values.
    parseEnum(String, Class, T) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses the given raw string into an enum constant of the specified enum type.
    parseEnumList(String, Class) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses a delimited string into a list of Enum constants of the specified type.
    parseInstant(String, Instant) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses a string into an Instant.
    parseInt(String, int) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses the given raw string into an integer.
    parseInt(String, int, int, int) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses a string into an integer, ensuring the parsed value falls within a specified range.
    parseIntList(String) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses a string containing integer values separated by delimiters (commas, semicolons, or whitespace) into a list of integers.
    parseKeyValueMap(String) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses a raw string into a map of key-value pairs.
    parseLong(String, long) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses the given string into a long value.
    parseLongList(String) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses a delimited string into a list of Long values.
    parseString(String, String) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses a raw string and returns a trimmed, non-empty string.
    parseStringList(String) - Static method in class org.tavall.gemini.utils.AIResponseParser
    Parses a raw string into a list of trimmed strings, splitting the input by common delimiters such as commas, semicolons, or newline characters.
